title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Lodha Group - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Lodha Group - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at Lodha Group are looking for an experienced Sales Manager based out of Meerut. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Lodha Group:
Lodha Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Project Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Professional development and training programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Lodha Group!
